what_it_does: This file is a noticeboard signal item that records the operator's decision for the visual-fidelity decision, selecting the option 'Push the drawn style further first', and states that work gated on decision://global/visual-fidelity can resume.
observations: YAML frontmatter declares id item-f40d30c1, address board://item-f40d30c1, type signal, source claude_code, state raised.
Title and body both state the chosen option: 'Push the drawn style further first'.
Links include an attached_to edge targeting decision://global/visual-fidelity.
History shows a single state transition from null to raised by operator with note 'filed'.
Channel and thread fields are empty strings; no code symbols are present.
standouts: It is a raised decision signal, not a discussion or task.
The chosen option is a creative direction: push the drawn style further before other fidelity work.
It explicitly unblocks work gated on a decision:// URI.
conventions: Follows the noticeboard item schema with YAML frontmatter and markdown body.
Uses board:// and decision:// URI schemes for addressable artifacts.
Includes an audit history entry for the state transition.
Signal type and source claude_code indicate an assistant-generated record.
concerns: Channel and thread are empty, so routing/threading context is missing.
No rationale or criteria for selecting this option is captured.
The resume instruction is stated but no specific downstream work items are listed.
notes: A raised decision signal that picks the drawn-style-first option for visual fidelity and tells gated work it may resume.
questions: What criteria led to choosing 'Push the drawn style further first' over alternatives?
Which specific work items are gated on decision://global/visual-fidelity?

purpose_vs_actual: Matches: the file's stated purpose is to record a decided option and signal resumption, which is exactly what the content does.
apparent_themes: Human operator authority over creative direction
intention_signals: To make the operator's choice durable and broadcast it as an unblocking event so downstream lanes can resume with the agreed direction.
novelty: Uses a decision:// URI as a resumption gate for a subjective visual-style choice, treating creative direction as a gated dependency.
contribution: It preserves the selected visual-fidelity option and the explicit unblocking signal, giving a fused system a durable decision record and a clear resumption trigger.
summary_for_embedding: Raised noticeboard signal recording the operator's decision to select 'Push the drawn style further first' for the visual-fidelity decision and indicating that work gated on decision://global/visual-fidelity can resume.
intention_for_embedding: To communicate the resolved visual-fidelity option and unblock downstream work gated on the associated decision.
